description: Per-model thinking capability and recommended flags. Consumed by qualify.py and TCF experiments to set the correct `think` flag per model. Avoids the bug where think=False breaks reasoning-native models.

categories.none: Model has no thinking capability; think flag is ignored/irrelevant
categories.toggle: Model supports think=true/false; can be disabled without breaking
categories.intrinsic: Model requires thinking (reasoning-native); disabling breaks output
categories.graded: Model supports thinking levels (low/medium/high) via reasoning_effort
categories.unknown: Not yet characterized — default to think=None (model's default)

phi4:latest.notes: Base phi4 — no reasoning. phi4-reasoning is a separate model.

llama3.2-vision:11b.notes: Multimodal; visual encoder may interfere with text-only

qwen3:0.6b.notes: Small; thinking=on causes pathological loops on CPU. PROVISIONAL per 2026-04-20 phase 5 abort.

qwen3:1.7b.notes: Same as 0.6b — thinking on CPU is slow/unstable. Use false for qualification.

qwen3:8b.notes: Larger; thinking likely works on GPU. Keep false for consistency with baseline.

qwen3:14b.notes: Works well with think=false on GPU (Phase 1 data).

qwen3-vl:8b.notes: Multimodal Qwen3; V2 list_colors prompt with color examples hangs. Likely vision encoder pathology on visual descriptors.

deepseek-r1:7b.notes: CONFIRMED 2026-04-20: think=False causes prompt-echo bug. Never use think=false. Let default (None) for thinking-on.

deepseek-r1:14b.notes: Larger; tolerates think=false with 100% in Phase 1, but canonical default to None for consistency. Thinking likely improves performance but wasn't tested at 100% ceiling.

gpt-oss:latest.notes: Supports reasoning_effort = low | medium | high. Default medium. In Phase 1 ran with think=false equivalent but still got 100%. Need dedicated ablation.

policy.qualification_default: Use catalog default_think per model. Only override with explicit --force-think-false for ablation.
policy.tcf_experiments_default: Same — use catalog default_think. When comparing thinking on/off, create separate phase with different key prefix.
policy.unknown_models_default: null (model's own default, typically on for reasoning-capable, off for others)
